name: ai-lead-generation-agent
description: Root package runner for AI Lead Generation & Outreach Agent

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm install && npm run install-all && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run db:generate --prefix backend
scripts.start: npx prisma db push --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma && node backend/server.js
